The Merakinetics Arsenal.

From the Iso Flow to the APS System — every piece of Merakinetics equipment is designed to integrate seamlessly into your intelligent movement ecosystem.

MK Series
01 / 03
Dumbbell
Hangers System
Push your limits safely — no spotter required.
  • Spotter-Free StrengthThis heavy-duty accessory mounts dumbbells directly to standard barbells, eliminating the dangerous kick-up and the need for a spotter during maximal pushing and pressing movements.
Adjustable Angles Rack-Integrated Dumbbell Storage
Buy Now
MK Series
02 / 03
APS Machine
System
Master the ultimate unilateral movement.
  • The Vertical ApexA proprietary Hip Extension Mechanism smoothly oscillates along a shaft to perfectly mimic the natural squat movement pattern.
  • Spatial IntelligenceIntegrated LiDAR and AR capture sub-millimeter motion data, providing real-time visual cues to optimize center-of-gravity tracking and adapt mechanical assistance to your exact strength curve.
LiDAR + AR Hip Extension Mechanism Strength Curve Adapt
Buy Now
MK Series
03 / 03
ISO Flow
System
Eliminate energy leaks. Maximize rotational torque.
  • The Axis of PowerTotal center-axis stabilization isolates the thoracic core for pure rotational training — no compensation, no energy leak.
  • Modular BrillianceSeamlessly shares the same software, LiDAR, and AR motion capture backbone as the APS Machine, creating a unified biomechanical data stream.
Thoracic Isolation Unified LiDAR AR Motion Capture
Buy Now
Software Ecosystem

The Myokinetics
OS.

One unified platform connecting every machine, every rep, and every data point into a single intelligent biomechanical ecosystem. Your training intelligence — in your pocket, on your display, and inside every Merakinetics machine.

iOS
Android
Machine Display
AR Headset
01
Unified Biomechanical Data Stream
Every Merakinetics machine — ISO Flow, APS, Dumbbell Hangers — feeds real-time LiDAR, AR motion capture, and force data into a single unified platform. No silos. One continuous intelligence layer across your entire facility.
LiDAR Fusion Cross-Machine Sync Real-Time
02
Adaptive AI Coaching Engine
The Myokinetics AI doesn't follow a script — it learns. Every session refines your personal strength curve model, adjusting resistance, tempo cues, and recovery protocols to your exact physiological state in real time.
Neural Adaptation Strength Curve Model Auto-Periodization
03
AR Correctional Feedback
Real-time augmented reality overlays projected onto your movement — joint angle corrections, center-of-gravity cues, and bilateral symmetry warnings delivered the moment your form deviates, not after the set.
Joint Angle AR Live Corrections Symmetry Tracking
04
Myokinetics Score & Elite Analytics
Your Myokinetics Score is a living metric — a composite of torque output, bilateral balance, ROM progression, tempo consistency, and recovery efficiency. The same analytics infrastructure used by professional sports organizations, now available to every member.
Composite Scoring Pro-Grade Analytics ROM Tracking
05
Mobile + Machine Display Sync
The Myokinetics app runs natively on iOS and Android — and syncs in real time with every machine's integrated display. Start a session on your phone, continue on the machine, review on your AR headset. Your data is always where you are.
iOS & Android Machine Display AR Headset
06
Facility & Coaching Dashboard
Gym operators and coaches get a live facility overview — machine utilization, member session data, injury risk flags, and AI-generated programming recommendations. Scale your coaching intelligence across every athlete in your facility simultaneously.
Facility Overview Injury Risk AI Coach Dashboard
07
Precision Nutrition Engine
Your Myokinetics Score doesn't stop at the gym. The Nutrition Engine calculates macro targets, micronutrient timing, and hydration protocols in real time — dynamically adjusting to your session intensity, recovery status, and body composition goals. Every meal is a performance variable.
Macro Targeting Peri-Workout Timing Body Comp Tracking Hydration Protocol
⚡
AI Macro Calibration
Protein, carbohydrate, and fat targets recalculated after every session based on actual output — not generic formulas.
🕐
Nutrient Timing Windows
Pre, intra, and post-workout nutrition windows synced to your training schedule and LiDAR-measured exertion data.
📊
Body Composition Analytics
Weekly lean mass, fat mass, and hydration trend tracking — integrated directly into your Myokinetics Score dashboard.
🧬
Supplement Stack Protocol
Science-backed supplement timing recommendations layered onto your daily nutrition plan — no guesswork, just precision.
08
Intelligent Training Programs
AI-generated, biomechanically validated training programs built around your exact strength curves, movement asymmetries, and performance goals. Each program auto-adapts week to week using your live Myokinetics data — no two athletes train the same way.
Auto-Periodization Strength Curve Maps Asymmetry Correction Goal-Based Splits
🧠
Biomechanical Program Builder
Programs designed around your LiDAR-mapped movement profile — addressing your specific mobility limitations, dominant patterns, and injury history.
📈
Progressive Overload AI
Load, volume, and intensity auto-progressions driven by real output data — not arbitrary percentage increases. The machine knows when you're ready.
🔄
Recovery & Deload Protocols
Built-in recovery intelligence monitors fatigue accumulation and auto-inserts deload phases, mobility sessions, and active recovery days at exactly the right time.
🏆
Goal-Specific Protocols
Hypertrophy, maximal strength, rotational power, unilateral mastery — select your goal and the AI architects a complete evidence-based protocol around your Merakinetics equipment.
Ready to enter the Myokinetics ecosystem?
Available on iOS, Android, and pre-installed on all Merakinetics machines.

Next-Gen vs. Traditional.

Every dimension of traditional gym equipment has been reimagined. Here's the intelligence gap between what exists today and the Merakinetics Biomechanical Intelligence Ecosystem.

Traditional / Current Equipment
VS
Merakinetics Ecosystem
Safety & Spotter Dependency
Pressing Movements
Requires spotter for maximal loads — dangerous kick-up risks muscle tears and drops
Dumbbell Hangers System
Spotter-free maximal pressing — dumbbells mount directly to barbell, zero kick-up risk
Manual loading with no movement intelligence — injury caused by form breakdown goes undetected
AR correctional overlays flag form deviation in real time — before injury occurs
Data Intelligence & Tracking
Data Capture
Manual data tracking — pen-and-paper or basic app logging with no real-time feedback
Myokinetics OS
Sub-millimeter LiDAR + AR captures 2.4M data points per second — continuous live biomechanical stream
Disconnected ecosystem — each machine operates in isolation with no cross-device data sharing
Unified biomechanical data stream across all MK machines — ISO Flow, APS & Hangers share one intelligence layer
APS Machine — Assisted Pistol Squat
Unilateral Training
Generalized resistance — cable machines offer no movement-pattern specificity for pistol squats
Hip Extension Mechanism
Proprietary shaft oscillation perfectly mimics natural squat arc — adapts mechanical assistance to your exact strength curve
Untracked movement — no center-of-gravity data, no bilateral feedback, no real-time correction
Integrated LiDAR + AR delivers real-time CoG tracking and visual cues directly in your field of vision
ISO Flow System — Rotational Power
Core Training
Cable rotations allow energy leaks through hips and shoulders — no thoracic isolation, no torque measurement
Axis of Power
Total center-axis stabilization isolates the thoracic core — pure rotational torque output mapped in real time
Spotter reliance — increased risk on maximal rotational loads with no safety mechanism
Shares APS LiDAR + AR backbone — unified motion capture across all machines for one complete biomechanical profile
AI Coaching & Personalization
Program Design
Generic one-size-fits-all programs — no awareness of your movement asymmetries, strength curves, or recovery state
Adaptive AI Engine
LiDAR-mapped strength curves drive fully personalized auto-periodized programs that evolve with every session
Elite analytics reserved for professional sports teams — inaccessible to individual athletes and commercial gyms
Myokinetics Score delivers pro-grade analytics to every member — the same infrastructure used by professional organizations
0% Real-Time Intelligence
GAP

Q2 2025 Coming Soon
MK AR Headset — Fully Integrated Training Visor
Coming Soon
The Merakinetics AR Headset projects real-time joint angle corrections, center-of-gravity markers, and bilateral symmetry overlays directly onto your field of vision during training. Sub-5ms latency. Zero disruption to your natural movement.
AR Overlay Sub-5ms Latency Joint Angle HUD CoG Tracking
Development78%
Myokinetics Score 2.0 — Genetic & Recovery Integration
Coming Soon
Version 2.0 of the Myokinetics Score integrates HRV, sleep quality, and optional genetic marker data to produce the most complete readiness and performance score in consumer fitness — dynamically adjusting your training load before you even pick up a weight.
HRV Integration Sleep Tracking Genetic Markers Readiness Score
Development65%
Q4 2025 In Development
MK NeuroStim Wearable — Electromuscular Precision Suit
In Development
A precision electromuscular stimulation suit that pairs with every Merakinetics machine — delivering targeted muscle activation cues, neuromuscular re-education, and post-session recovery stimulation. Designed for elite athletes and clinical rehabilitation alike.
EMS Technology Muscle Activation Rehab Protocol Machine Paired
Development42%
MK Force Plate System — Ground Reaction Intelligence
In Development
Embedded force plate tiles that map ground reaction forces, weight distribution, and explosive power output across every Merakinetics training zone. Integrates seamlessly into the Myokinetics OS for a complete picture of ground-to-muscle force transfer.
Force Plates GRF Analysis Explosive Power Balance Mapping
Development35%
2026+ Future Vision
MK Neural Interface — Brain-Machine Training Protocol
Concept
A non-invasive EEG-based neural interface that detects focus, fatigue, and motor intention signals — using brain state data to automatically adjust machine resistance, rest periods, and coaching cues in real time. The next frontier of human-machine athletic intelligence.
EEG Interface Motor Intention Brain-State Adaptive Research Phase
Research12%
MK Digital Twin — Your Complete Biomechanical Avatar
Concept
A full 3D digital twin of your biomechanical profile — built from years of LiDAR, AR, force plate, and biometric data. Simulate training loads, test new protocols, and predict injury risk before it happens. Your body, modeled at the molecular level.
3D Avatar Injury Prediction Protocol Simulation Molecular Modeling
Research8%

Investor Relations.

The next disruptor in Health & Wellness — Merakinetics Inc is raising to bring revolutionary, patented fitness technology to market. Join us in standardizing the future of data-driven training.

Now Raising · SAFE or Equity Round

The Next Disruptor in
Health & Wellness.

Merakinetics Inc is launching a revolutionary product line that redefines safety, biomechanics, and efficiency for all users. Our products are engineered to reduce injuries, expand accessibility for resistance training, and optimize biomechanics — transforming lives across home gyms, commercial facilities, and rehabilitation centers.

We are conducting a SAFE or Equity Round raise of $300K–$500K for production, go-to-market, research, and expansion. ROI and equity structure are open to negotiation based on contribution level. Joint ventures welcome.

View Live Campaign on Wefunder →
01
Patented, First-of-Its-Kind Solutions
The Dumbbell Hangers is the first-ever dumbbell safety solution targeting home gyms, commercial gyms, and rehabilitation centers — with zero market contenders. The APS Machine is the first dedicated SMART Pistol Squat training machine. Both are patented. Neither has a competitor.
02
$25B Market by 2030 · 5% CAGR
The fitness equipment market is projected to reach $25B by 2030 at a steady 5% CAGR. TAM: $8.8B globally. SAM: $108M in the U.S. SOM: $5M–$10M in the first three years. Merakinetics enters with early mover advantage in an untapped injury prevention segment.
03
Validated Market Demand
90% of target market surveyed desire access to Merakinetics equipment in their gym. 5 preorders and a 61-unit waitlist for Dumbbell Hangers — generating ~$22K in preorder value across domestic and international markets. Product 1 purchase order received. Product 2 in quotation.
04
Technology Readiness · TRL 9 & TRL 5
The Dumbbell Hangers is at Technology Readiness Level 9 — fully proven and production-ready. The APS Machine is at TRL 5 — core technology validated in a relevant environment. Capital raised funds production of Product 1 and development acceleration of Product 2.
05
Established Market Partnerships
User data gathered from trainers in reputable gyms nationwide. Partnered with a local gym owner and high-level affiliate/influencer marketer. Gym owners want the latest equipment — gym goers invest in accessing it. The distribution channel is already being built.
06
Data-Driven Health & Wellness Standard
Merakinetics isn't launching fitness equipment — it is innovating the Health & Wellness industry. The future of H&W must be data-driven to account for uncontrollable population factors: medical history, mobility, and training experience. Merakinetics standardizes that integration.
Ready to invest in the next Health & Wellness disruptor?
SAFE or Equity Round · $300K–$500K raise · Joint ventures welcome · Equity structure open to negotiation.
